messages.content:
Hey there! 👋 I'm your AI Trading Intelligence — ready to dive into stocks, fundamentals, technicals, or market trends! What can I help you analyze today? 📈 

I can provide:
📊 Real-time stock analysis with 8+ technical indicators
💰 Fundamental analysis (P/E, EPS, ROE, debt ratios)
📰 Latest news & sentiment for any stock
🤖 AI predictions from our trained LSTM models
👨‍💼 Wall Street analyst consensus & recommendations
📈 Options, ETF, and portfolio strategy guidance
📚 Education on any finance/trading concept
Try: 'Analyze Nvidia' or 'What is P/E ratio?'

Nice to meet you, Naveen! 👋 I'm your AI Trading Intelligence assistant. How can I help you today? Are you looking to analyze a specific stock, learn about a financial concept, or discuss market trends? 📈 

Feel free to ask me anything, and I'll do my best to provide you with accurate and helpful information. What's on your mind, Naveen? 🤔
You're welcome, Naveen! 😊 It was my pleasure to chat with you. If you have any questions about stocks, finance, or trading, or just want to say hello, I'm here to help. Have a great day! 📈
